title: Hoe Scythes
description: This mod allows hoes to clear large areas of grass, seagrass, ferns, and more, based on the hoe's material, making land clearing quick and efficient.
body:
Enhance your gardening and farming experience with the Hoe Scythes Mod! This mod adds an intuitive functionality to your hoes, allowing you to clear large areas of grass and grass-like blocks with ease. Depending on the material of your hoe, you can break various types of grass, including tall grass, seagrass, ferns, and large ferns, in a single swing.

# 

### Features:
- **Wooden Hoe**: 3x3 area.
- **Iron Hoe**: 5x5 area.
- **Diamond Hoe**: 7x7 area.
- **Netherite Hoe**: 9x9 area.

#
  
Make your land clearing tasks more efficient and enjoyable with the Hoe Scythes Mod! Perfect for gardeners, farmers, and anyone looking to keep their landscapes tidy.
